description: MCP server for Ryvo Gateway x402, Helius Wallet, and Tokens API market data.
name: io.github.Ryvonetwork/ryvo-gateway

environmentVariables.description: Optional Ryvo Gateway base URL. Defaults to https://gateway.ryvo.network.
environmentVariables.name: RYVO_GATEWAY_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Executed only by ryvo_gateway_auth_call after an HTTP 402: spawns once with the normalized auth-request JSON on stdin (same shape as ryvo_gateway_prepare_auth). Stdout must be JSON auth output (headers map, or SIWX address+signature). On Windows, npx/npm run under cmd.exe; treat RYVO_SIGNER_COMMAND as untrusted if an attacker controls it.
environmentVariables.name: RYVO_SIGNER_COMMAND

environmentVariables.description: Optional Ryvo wallet profile hint passed to signer hooks.
environmentVariables.name: RYVO_WALLET_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional x402 maximum USD amount per request.
environmentVariables.name: RYVO_PAYMENT_MAX_AMOUNT_USD

environmentVariables.description: Optional x402 daily authorized spend limit in USD.
environmentVariables.name: RYVO_PAYMENT_DAILY_LIMIT_USD
